mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PJT_BASC
(PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EMP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: /* com.kdt.pjt_pjt.mapper.pjt_mng.PjtMngMapper.updatePjtProc */ UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET PJT_NM = #{PJT_NM}, EMP_NM = #{EMP_NM}, PJT_BGNG_DT = #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, PJT_END_DT = #{PJT_END_DT}, PJT_STTS_CD = #{PJT_STTS_CD}, LAST_MDFCN_DT = #{LAST_MDFCN_DT}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{LAST_MDFR_ID} WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
mapper.select:
SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, EMP_SEQ, EMP_NM, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EMP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY PJT_SN ASC

SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, EMP_SEQ, EMP_NM, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC WHERE PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PJT_BASC ( PJT_NM, EMP_NM, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{PJT_NM}, #{EMP_NM}, #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, #{PJT_END_DT}, '01', 'SYSTEM', #{FRST_REG_DT} )
mapper.select: SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, EMP_NM, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD, EMP_SEQ, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC ORDER BY PJT_SN ASC

SELECT * FROM team2_db.TB_PJT_BASC
(PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EMP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY
EMP_NM PJT_BGNG_DT PJT_NM
${order} LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM TB_PJT_BASC ORDER BY PJT_SN DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
